chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. D- 1506 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 19.08.2025 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case Mr. Waqar Ahmed Memon, Advocate along with Petitioners Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G. Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, A.P.G. along with I.O / SIP Abdul Khaliq PS Aziz Bhatti & P.I / SIO Naseem Ahmed PS Aziz Bhatti. Petitioners are present along with their counsel. Petitioner No.1 once again has categorically made a statement before this Court that she being sui- juiris has contracted marriage with petitioner No.2 on her own freewill and choice without any pressure or coercion. She has further stated that neither she has been kidnapped nor abducted as alleged in the FIR bearing Crime No. 418 of 2025 under Section 494, 496-A 34 PPC & Section 3 Prevention of Trafficking In persons Act, 2018 of Police Station Aziz Bhatti district East Karachi. Today I.O of the case is present in Court and has recorded the Statement under Section 161 Cr.P.C of Petitioner No.1 Mst. Komal wherein she has reiterated the facts as stated hereinabove. I.O states that he shall file report before the concerned Magistrate in “C” class. He shall do so within seven days from today. The concerned Magistrate shall pass orders in accordance with law on the report so submitted by the I.O. So far as the grievance of the private respondents, if any, is concerned, they are at liberty to approach the proper forum for redressal of their grievance, if so advised. In the meantime, legal protection shall be provided to the petitioners as and when required and on the verbal complaint of petitioner that private Respondents are issuing threats to them, the respondents are directed to remain away from the petitioners and shall not been seen in the vicinity of petitioners.

So far as the grievance of the private respondents, if any, is concerned, they are at liberty to approach the proper forum for redressal of their grievance, if so advised. In the meantime, legal protection shall be provided to the petitioners as and when required and on the verbal complaint of petitioner that private Respondents are issuing threats to them, the respondents are directed to remain away from the petitioners and shall not been seen in the vicinity of petitioners. This petition stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
